product.name: Wireless Charging Pad 15W Fast Charge
product.description: Compatible with iPhone 12/13/14/15, Samsung Galaxy S22/S23, AirPods. Intelligent chip prevents overheating. LED indicator. No cable fuss — just place and charge.

related.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Headphones
related.description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with 30-hour battery life. Crystal-clear hands-free calling and Alexa built-in. Multipoint connection lets you pair to two Bluetooth devices simultaneously.

related.name: Kindle Paperwhite 16GB Waterproof E-Reader
related.description: Glare-free display that reads like real paper even in bright sunlight. Adjustable warm light. IPX8 waterproof — reads safely in the bath or by the pool. 10 weeks battery life.

related.name: Mechanical Keyboard TKL RGB Backlit
related.description: Tenkeyless layout saves desk space. Blue tactile switches. Per-key RGB lighting with 18 effects. USB-C detachable cable. N-key rollover for gaming.
